posts.author: P2018
posts.text: Helps them on production in Bakrol and Cambay fields. They do not pay any royalty in Karjisan. Incrementally positive and should boost near term earnings. Structurally its a great way to explore additional wells. Entire ecosystem benefits!

posts.author: NishaP
posts.text: India cuts royalty burden on oil and gas producers in push for domestic output - The Economic Times

posts.author: Prdnt_investor
posts.text: Excellent post from @suru27 scientificinvesting.substack.com The Oilfield That Finally Breathed Sometimes, nothing happens for decades and then decades happen in a year. Such is story of Antelopus Selan where sales tripled between FY22-25. So, what is in store going for future? Let us explore.
